payload.answer: Recall behaved correctly: mem_new was returned because it is the current, non-superseded memory matching Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it is marked as superseded by mem_new, so returning it as a current fact would risk showing stale information. The old memory may still exist for audit/history, but it should not be surfaced as the active answer.
